claims: The skill claims to be a "Firebase Rules Generator" but requests `Bash(gcloud:*)` permission, allowing execution of any Google Cloud CLI command across all GCP services (Compute, BigQuery, Vertex AI, etc.), which is excessive for generating Firebase security rules. The stated primary purpose (rules generation) does not justify broad administrative access to all GCP resources, potentially enabling unintended modifications or data access beyond Firebase.
